title: HTB Active — Easy Windows
description: Full writeup for HackTheBox Active. SMB anonymous share enumeration, GPP password decryption with gpp-decrypt, and Kerberoasting the Administrator account to get SYSTEM.

title: XSS Cheatsheet
description: Cross-Site Scripting quick reference: reflected, stored and DOM-based XSS payloads, filter bypass techniques and CSP evasion.

title: Python Port Scanner
description: Multithreaded Python port scanner with banner grabbing, service detection and JSON output. Lightweight Nmap alternative for CTFs.

title: Dissecting a Basic Ransomware Sample
description: Static and dynamic analysis of a minimal ransomware sample. AES key derivation, file enumeration logic and ransom note delivery mechanism.

title: HTB Forest — Easy Windows
description: HackTheBox Forest writeup. AS-REP Roasting against a domain without pre-auth, BloodHound enumeration and DCSync via WriteDACL abuse.

title: LDAP Enumeration
description: LDAP enumeration techniques for Active Directory: ldapsearch, windapsearch and manual queries to extract users, groups and policies.

title: Linux Privilege Escalation Enum Script
description: Bash script for automated Linux privilege escalation enumeration: SUID binaries, cron jobs, writable paths, capabilities and sudo misconfigs.

title: HTB Nibbles — Easy Linux
description: HackTheBox Nibbles writeup. Nibbleblog CMS exploitation via authenticated file upload and sudo misconfiguration for privilege escalation.

title: Common API Security Misconfigurations
description: Research on the most common API security issues: broken object level auth, mass assignment, excessive data exposure and BOLA in REST APIs.

title: Hash Cracking Notes
description: Quick reference for hash cracking: hashcat modes, john rules, wordlist generation with crunch and common hash identification.

title: Python Subdomain Enumerator
description: Async Python subdomain enumerator using DNS resolution and wordlists. Supports wildcard detection and JSON/CSV output.

title: HTB BoardLight — Easy Linux
description: HackTheBox BoardLight walkthrough. Dolibarr ERP default credentials, PHP webshell upload and Enlightenment SUID exploit for root.
